# signoz Provider

Manage SigNoz dashboards, alerts, notification channels, saved views, and log pipelines as code.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "signoz" {
  # endpoint     = "https://signoz.example.com"  # or SIGNOZ_ENDPOINT
  # access_token = "<service-account-token>"      # or SIGNOZ_ACCESS_TOKEN (sensitive)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) SigNoz Service Account access token, sent as the `SIGNOZ-API-KEY` header. May also be set via the `SIGNOZ_ACCESS_TOKEN` environment variable. Required for any real API call.
- `endpoint` (String) Base URL of the SigNoz query-service API (e.g. `https://signoz.example.com`). Defaults to `http://localhost:3301`. May also be set via the `SIGNOZ_ENDPOINT` environment variable.
- `http_max_retry` (Number) Maximum retries for transient (5xx / network) failures. Defaults to 3. May also be set via `SIGNOZ_HTTP_MAX_RETRY`.
- `http_timeout` (Number) Per-request HTTP timeout in seconds. Defaults to 35. May also be set via `SIGNOZ_HTTP_TIMEOUT`.
